protein_name: Required for efficient transcription initiation by RNA polymerase I. Required for the formation of the competent preinitiation complex (PIC). Dissociates from pol I as a consequence of transcription. In vitro, cannot activate transcription in a subsequent transcription reaction. Belongs to the RRN3 family. 4 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: protein binding; RNA polymerase binding; RNA polymerase I core binding; RNA polymerase I core promoter sequence-specific DNA binding; RNA polymerase I general transcription initiation factor activity
raw_fields.Biological Process: RNA polymerase I preinitiation complex assembly; transcription initiation at RNA polymerase I promoter
